{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The bottom of the nesting dolls says, "Beautiful Katyusha, I shall return in summer or fall."
|affct=CIV
|hard=DEF
|source=Divine Order Chest (0.4%)
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=4
|fire=4
|wind=3
|form=Mutant
|element=Water
|realm=Hellas
|orangehard=HP
}}
